name: Apple Bread #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and 1 cup of sugar together until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the eggs, one at a time, making sure to mix well after each addition.
3. Dissolve baking soda in the buttermilk and stir into the batter.
4. Stir in flour, vanilla, apples, walnuts, and raisins until combined.
5. Pour the mixture into two greased and floured loaf pans.
6. Drizzle melted butter over the top of each loaf.
7. Sprinkle a combination of brown sugar and cinnamon evenly across the loaves.
8. Bake at 350°F for 40 to 45 minutes.
9. Allow the bread to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before transferring it to a wire rack to cool completely.
